languages.original_text: "As you instructed, he is being tended to in the Sector Bionica. His cognitive functions have almost entirely failed, and only the Omnissiah's mercy keeps him from losing all mobility. The Triasomata spends his days bowed in prayer — or so we presume, since he has lost all verbal capacity. He appears to be... at peace."

languages.text: "Как вы и распорядились, за ним ухаживают в Секторе Бионика. Его когнитивные функции почти полностью отказали и лишь милость Омниссии удерживает его от полной потери мобильности. Триасомата проводит свои дни склонившись в молитве — по крайней мере мы так предполагаем, ведь блаженный утратил все речевые навыки. Он выглядит... умиротворенным".

"As you instructed, he is being tended to in the Sector Bionica. His cognitive functions have almost entirely failed, and only the Omnissiah's mercy keeps him from losing all mobility. The Triasomata spends his days bowed in prayer — or so we presume, since he has lost all verbal capacity. He appears to be... at peace."
languages.original_text: "Как вы и распорядились, за ним ухаживают в Секторе Бионика. Его когнитивные функции почти полностью отказали и лишь милость Омниссии удерживает его от полной потери мобильности. Триасомата проводит свои дни склонившись в молитве — по крайней мере мы так предполагаем, ведь блаженный утратил все речевые навыки. Он выглядит... умиротворенным".

traits.locale_text: "As you instructed, he is being tended to in the Sector Bionica. His cognitive functions have almost entirely failed, and only the Omnissiah's mercy keeps him from losing all mobility. The Triasomata spends his days bent in prayer, or so we presume, since he has lost all verbal knowledge. He appears... serene."

"As you instructed, he is being tended to in the Sector Bionica. His cognitive functions have almost entirely failed, and only the Omnissiah's mercy keeps him from losing all mobility. The Triasomata spends his days bowed in prayer — or so we presume, since he has lost all verbal capacity. He appears to be... at peace."

"As you instructed, he is now serving in the Sector Bionica. I have observed positive progress in his psychological adaptation to his new body, but his syndromic pain still requires regular interventions. He continues to fear me, so the esteemed Vivisector Martinax and Genetor Ferrenz have been performing the examinations."

The Triasomata spends his days bent in prayer, or so we presume, since he has lost all verbal knowledge. He appears... serene."

The Triasomata spends his days bowed in prayer — or so we presume, since he has lost all verbal capacity. He appears to be... at peace."

"As you instructed, he is being tended to in the Sector Bionica. His cognitive functions have almost entirely failed, and only the Omnissiah's mercy keeps him from losing all mobility. The Triasomata spends his days bowed in prayer — or so we presume, since he has lost all verbal capacity. He appears to be... at peace."

languages.text: 「貴方の指示に従い、彼は現在、バイオニカ地区で勤務しています。新しい身体への心理的な適応は、好ましい進捗を見せていますが、彼の症候群による痛みは、定期的な介入を必要としています。彼は私を恐れているので、尊敬されるマルタックス博士とフェレンツ博士が検査を行っています」
languages.original_text: "As you instructed, he is now serving in the Sector Bionica. I have observed positive progress in his psychological adaptation to his new body, but his syndromic pain still requires regular interventions. He continues to fear me, so the esteemed Vivisector Martinax and Genetor Ferrenz have been performing the examinations."

traits.locale_text: 「貴方の指示に従い、彼は現在、バイオニカ地区で勤務しています。新しい身体への心理的な適応は、好ましい進捗を見せていますが、彼の症候群による痛みは、定期的な介入を必要としています。彼は私を恐れているので、尊敬されるマルタックス博士とフェレンツ博士が検査を行っています。」

languages.text: “遵您指示，他正在仿生区接受照料。他的认知功能几乎已完全丧失，仅凭欧姆尼赛亚的慈悲，才免于彻底失去行动能力。这位三相体终日躬身祈祷——至少我们是如此推想的，毕竟他已丧失了一切语言能力。他看起来……很是平和。”
languages.original_text: "As you instructed, he is being tended to in the Sector Bionica. His cognitive functions have almost entirely failed, and only the Omnissiah's mercy keeps him from losing all mobility. The Triasomata spends his days bowed in prayer — or so we presume, since he has lost all verbal capacity. He appears to be... at peace."

traits.locale_text: “遵您指示，他正在仿生区接受照料。他的认知功能几乎已完全丧失，仅凭欧姆尼赛亚的慈悲，才免于彻底失去行动能力。这位三相体终日躬身祈祷——至少我们是如此推想的，毕竟他已丧失了一切语言能力。他看起来……很是平和。”

languages.text: « Conformément à vos instructions, il est actuellement en observation au secteur Bionica. Ses fonctions cognitives ont presque toutes lâché, et seule la miséricorde de l'Omnimessie préserve encore ses facultés motrices. Le Triasomata passe ses journées prostré en prière, ou du moins est-ce ce que nous supposons, puisqu'il a également perdu la parole. Il a l'air... en paix. »
languages.original_text: "As you instructed, he is being tended to in the Sector Bionica. His cognitive functions have almost entirely failed, and only the Omnissiah's mercy keeps him from losing all mobility. The Triasomata spends his days bowed in prayer — or so we presume, since he has lost all verbal capacity. He appears to be... at peace."

traits.locale_text: « Conformément à vos instructions, il est actuellement en observation au secteur Bionica. Ses fonctions cognitives ont presque toutes lâché, et seule la miséricorde de l'Omnimessie préserve encore ses facultés motrices. Le Triasomata passe ses journées prostré en prière, ou du moins est-ce ce que nous supposons, puisqu'il a également perdu la parole. Il a l'air... en paix. »

languages.text: «Como ordenó, se le está atendiendo en el Sector Bionica. Sus funciones cognitivas son casi inexistentes y solo la misericordia del Omnissiah impide que pierda toda movilidad. El triasómata se pasa los días rezando, o eso creemos, ya que ha perdido la capacidad del habla. Pero parece estar... en paz».
languages.original_text: "As you instructed, he is being tended to in the Sector Bionica. His cognitive functions have almost entirely failed, and only the Omnissiah's mercy keeps him from losing all mobility. The Triasomata spends his days bowed in prayer — or so we presume, since he has lost all verbal capacity. He appears to be... at peace."

traits.locale_text: «Como ordenó, se le está atendiendo en el Sector Bionica. Sus funciones cognitivas son casi inexistentes y solo la misericordia del Omnissiah impide que pierda toda movilidad. El triasómata se pasa los días rezando, o eso creemos, ya que ha perdido la capacidad del habla. Pero parece estar... en paz».

languages.text: "Talimatınız doğrultusunda Sektör Biyonika'da kendisine bakılıyor. Bilişsel işlevleri neredeyse tamamen iflas etmiş durumda ve onu tüm hareket kabiliyetini kaybetmekten alıkoyan tek şey, Hermesih'in merhameti. Üçyeközlük günlerini dua ederek geçiriyor... Ya da biz öyle varsayıyoruz, zira konuşma yetisini tamamen kaybetti. Görünüşe göre... Huzur içinde."
languages.original_text: "As you instructed, he is being tended to in the Sector Bionica. His cognitive functions have almost entirely failed, and only the Omnissiah's mercy keeps him from losing all mobility. The Triasomata spends his days bowed in prayer — or so we presume, since he has lost all verbal capacity. He appears to be... at peace."

traits.locale_text: "Talimatınız doğrultusunda Sektör Biyonika'da kendisine bakılıyor. Bilişsel işlevleri neredeyse tamamen iflas etmiş durumda ve onu tüm hareket kabiliyetini kaybetmekten alıkoyan tek şey, Hermesih'in merhameti. Üçyeközlük günlerini dua ederek geçiriyor... Ya da biz öyle varsayıyoruz, zira konuşma yetisini tamamen kaybetti. Görünüşe göre... Huzur içinde."

languages.text: "Gemäß Eurer Anordnung wird er im Sektor Bionica behandelt. Seine kognitiven Funktionen sind fast vollständig ausgefallen und nur die Gnade des Omnissiah bewahrt ihn vor dem Verlust seiner Mobilität. Der Triasomata verbringt seine Tage im stillen Gebet ... jedenfalls nehmen wir das an, da er auch seine Sprachfähigkeit eingebüßt hat. Er hat offenbar ... seinen Frieden gefunden."
languages.original_text: "As you instructed, he is being tended to in the Sector Bionica. His cognitive functions have almost entirely failed, and only the Omnissiah's mercy keeps him from losing all mobility. The Triasomata spends his days bowed in prayer — or so we presume, since he has lost all verbal capacity. He appears to be... at peace."
